name: Craft Bank
description_short: Craft Bank is a community bank serving small- and mid-sized businesses nationwide with customized commercial banking, SBA lending, and personal banking products through a digital platform and remote bankers.
description_long:
Craft Bank is a locally owned and operated community bank that positions itself as an alternative to impersonal large financial institutions. The bank holds FDIC insurance (Routing #061021471, NMLS #2059926) and emphasizes personalized, customer-focused banking solutions. Founded on the principle of redefining community banking, Craft Bank combines traditional relationship banking with modern digital technology to serve small and mid-sized business owners nationwide.

Craft Bank offers a comprehensive suite of commercial and personal banking products. Their business banking services include customized loan solutions, SBA lending programs, treasury management services, and business checking accounts. They also provide personal checking accounts, personal financial products, and mobile banking capabilities designed to integrate with business banking. The bank operates a digital platform accessible nationwide and maintains a team of 40+ remote bankers available to customers.

Craft Bank differentiates itself through several key attributes. The bank ranks in the top 10% nationwide for SBA lending activity and ranks #54 out of 143 banks on Georgia's "All-Stars" list. They emphasize quick loan decisions due to their nimble, locally-owned structure. The company positions bankers as guides and consultants rather than transactional service providers, and highlights their combination of big-bank technology with community-bank personal relationships. Their digital platform and mobile banking app are designed to be accessible "everywhere," allowing customers to bank remotely.

Craft Bank is best suited for small- to mid-sized business owners seeking relationship-based banking with faster decision-making than large national banks. Honest assessment: while the website emphasizes personalized service and SBA lending strength, specific product details (APRs, fees, account minimums, loan terms) are not disclosed on their homepage, requiring customers to contact the bank directly. Geographic focus appears centered on Georgia despite claims of nationwide service.
services: Business checking accounts with customized solutions
SBA lending and small business loans
Treasury management services for business clients
Consultation and advisory services from dedicated bankers
pros: Top 10% nationwide in SBA lending activity, providing strong small business loan options
Ranked #54 out of 143 banks in Georgia on the 'Georgia All-Stars' list
FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government full faith and credit
40+ dedicated bankers available for personalized consultation and ongoing support
Digital platform and mobile banking accessible nationwide for remote customers
Quick loan decisions due to locally-owned, nimble operational structure
Combines sophisticated digital technology with human relationship banking model
cons: No specific fee structures, APRs, or account minimums disclosed on website
Loan products and personal banking offerings lack detailed terms and eligibility requirements
Claims nationwide service but appears primarily Georgia-based with limited branch/office locations mentioned
No transparent comparison of rates or products versus competitor banks provided
Requires direct contact to obtain pricing, making initial comparison shopping difficult
best_for: Small- to mid-sized business owners seeking relationship-based commercial banking with SBA loan access
Business owners in Georgia and surrounding states wanting faster loan decisions than large national banks
Entrepreneurs who value personalized banking consultation alongside digital banking convenience
Businesses seeking integrated personal and business banking solutions in a single institution
diagnosis: Craft Bank is best for small- to mid-sized business owners and entrepreneurs who value personalized banking relationships, SBA lending expertise, and quick decision-making from a locally-owned institution. Main caveat: detailed product specifications, fees, rates, and account minimums are not available on their website, so prospective customers must contact the bank directly to compare offerings against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
